revision.comment: The base category for "Wikipedia articles with style issues from $DATE" is [[Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues by month]], not [[Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues]], since [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2018 August 18#Category:Wikipedia articles with style issues]]. See [[Category talk:Wikipedia articles with style issues#Follow-up after restructure]] for details.
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Ambox | name = Essay-like | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{{small|}}} | type = style | class = ambox-essay-like | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''is written like {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|a [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a publisher of original thought|personal reflection, personal essay, or argumentative essay]]|an [[WP:EDITORIAL|editorial]] or [[WP:NOTESSAY|personal essay]]}}''' that states a Wikipedia editor's personal feelings or presents an original argument about a topic. | fix = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} help improve it] by rewriting it in an [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles#Information style and tone|encyclopedic style]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} }}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Essay-like here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Essay-like for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = Essay-like
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| small = {{{small|}}}
| type  = style
| class = ambox-essay-like
| sect  = {{{1|}}}
| issue = '''is written like {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|a [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a publisher of original thought|personal reflection, personal essay, or argumentative essay]]|an [[WP:EDITORIAL|editorial]] or [[WP:NOTESSAY|personal essay]]}}''' that states a Wikipedia editor's personal feelings or presents an original argument about a topic.
| fix   = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} help improve it] by rewriting it in an [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles#Information style and tone|encyclopedic style]].
| removalnotice = yes
| date  = {{{date|}}}
}}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Essay-like for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=
{{Ambox
| name  = Essay-like
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| small = {{{small|}}}
| type  = style
| class = ambox-essay-like
| sect  = {{{1|}}}
| issue = '''is written like {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|a [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a publisher of original thought|personal reflection, personal essay, or argumentative essay]]|an [[WP:EDITORIAL|editorial]] or [[WP:NOTESSAY|personal essay]]}}''' that states a Wikipedia editor's personal feelings or presents an original argument about a topic.
| fix   = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} help improve it] by rewriting it in an [[Wikipedia:Writing better articles#Information style and tone|encyclopedic style]].
| removalnotice = yes
| date  = {{{date|}}}
}}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
